verdicts.reason: Ran regression suites myself: adjudication+judgment-adjudication+workspace-status+vibepro-gate-check+execute-merge e2e = 35/35 pass; and GER-E2E-005 real preparePullRequest completes producing a coherent gate DAG. No failures observed.

test/gate-evidence-edge-robustness.test.js actually contains and passes GER-S-001 (ENOENT/ENOTDIR), GER-S-002 (other-error re-throw), GER-S-003 (explicit kind/ref win), GER-S-004 (defaults+preserve), GER-S-005 (carry-through); confirmed by running node --test (11/11). GER-E2E-006 also verifies these branches are present.

diff of pr-manager.js shows add helper changed from buildEvidenceItem(kind,ref,{...extra,kind}) to buildEvidenceItem(kind,ref,extra); correctness now relies on AC-2 fix. GER-E2E-005 drives real preparePullRequest on a tmp git repo and asserts every matched_evidence item in gate:common_judgment_spine has a non-empty string kind (never sentinel), including the verificationMatches path where item.kind lives in extra. Ran e2e 6/6 pass.
GER-S-005 asserts matched_file_count/related_file_count/investigation_files/optional carried through while kind/strength stay correct; supported by ...extra spread-first in diff. Tests pass.
GER-S-004 asserts bare call yields declared/n-a/unknown defaults and a filled call keeps strong/current/verified; matches diff's ?? default logic. Tests pass.

diff shows buildEvidenceItem spreads ...extra FIRST then sets kind/ref explicitly; GER-S-003/GER-E2E-002 pass extra.kind='HIJACKED_KIND'/ref='HIJACKED_REF' and assert result.kind/ref equal the explicit args. Verified by running tests.

diff of src/execution-state.js shows safeReaddir returns [] for both ENOENT and ENOTDIR and throws otherwise; GER-S-001 exercises real ENOENT+ENOTDIR (file/sub) on tmpfs returning [], GER-S-002 asserts non-ENOENT/ENOTDIR (Symbol path) re-throws. Ran: 11/11 pass.
